name: Newsletter Delta Check + AI Digest (Every 3-4 Days)

parameters.subject: ={{ "VysionAI Digest — " + new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-IN",{day:"numeric",month:"long",year:"numeric"}) + " (" + $("Context + Build Prompt — EDIT HERE").first().json.email_count + " emails)" }}
parameters.message:
=={{ "

VysionAI Intelligence Digest

" + new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-IN",{day:"numeric",month:"long",year:"numeric"}) + " | " + $("Context + Build Prompt — EDIT HERE").first().json.email_count + " emails

" }}
